query: UPDATE automations SET name = COALESCE($2, name), schedule = COALESCE($3, schedule), prompt = COALESCE($4, prompt), status = COALESCE(($5::text)::automation_status, status), next_run_at = CASE WHEN $3 IS NULL THEN next_run_at ELSE $6 END, project_id = CASE WHEN $7 THEN $8 ELSE project_id END, kb_ids = COALESCE($9::uuid[], kb_ids), deliver_group_chat_id = CASE WHEN $10 THEN $11 ELSE deliver_group_chat_id END WHERE id = $1
